title: Influence: The Psychology of Persuasion
author: Robert Cialdini
description: Master the 5 core principles of ethical persuasion with skills drawn from decades of research into why people say yes.
longDescription: Robert Cialdini's classic work identifies the key principles of influence that drive human decision-making. These skills teach you to apply reciprocity, social proof, commitment and consistency, scarcity, and authority ethically in business, relationships, and communication — while also helping you recognize and defend against manipulative uses of these principles.
